list.name: machine_id
list.query: SELECT device_id AS __text FROM public.devices WHERE enabled = true ORDER BY device_id ASC;
list.label: Machine

options.content: APEX COMMANDNOC OVERVIEW  |  ENG DRILL-DOWN  |  CAPACITY FORECAST

panels.description: OS Taskbar navigation and CSS theme.

panels.title: Days Until Full (Resource Battery)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'Disk' AS metric,
  LEAST(
    CASE
      WHEN r.slope <= 0 THEN 9999
      WHEN t.disk_total_gb <= 0 THEN 9999
      ELSE GREATEST(0, ROUND((t.disk_total_gb - r.intercept) / r.slope, 0))
    END,
    9999
  ) AS "Days Until Full"
FROM (
  SELECT device_id,
    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS slope,
    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS intercept
  FROM (
    SELECT device_id,
      time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY time_bucket('1 day', bucket)) - 1 AS day_idx,
      AVG(avg_disk_used) AS avg_used
    FROM public.sys_hourly
    WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
  ) d
  GROUP BY device_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 7
) r
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, disk_total_gb
  FROM public.sys_metrics
  WHERE disk_total_gb > 0
  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC
) t ON t.device_id = r.device_id
ORDER BY 1 ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 'Disk' AS metric,
  LEAST(
    CASE
      WHEN r.slope <= 0 THEN 9999
      WHEN t.disk_total_gb <= 0 THEN 9999
      ELSE GREATEST(0, ROUND((t.disk_total_gb - r.intercept) / r.slope, 0))
    END,
    9999
  ) AS "Days Until Full"
FROM (
  SELECT device_id,
    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS slope,
    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS intercept
  FROM (
    SELECT device_id,
      time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY time_bucket('1 day', bucket)) - 1 AS day_idx,
      AVG(avg_disk_used) AS avg_used
    FROM public.sys_hourly
    WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
  ) d
  GROUP BY device_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 7
) r
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, disk_total_gb
  FROM public.sys_metrics
  WHERE disk_total_gb > 0
  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC
) t ON t.device_id = r.device_id
ORDER BY 1 ASC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 'Disk' AS metric,
  LEAST(
    CASE
      WHEN r.slope <= 0 THEN 9999
      WHEN t.disk_total_gb <= 0 THEN 9999
      ELSE GREATEST(0, ROUND((t.disk_total_gb - r.intercept) / r.slope, 0))
    END,
    9999
  ) AS "Days Until Full"
FROM (
  SELECT device_id,
    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS slope,
    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS intercept
  FROM (
    SELECT device_id,
      time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY time_bucket('1 day', bucket)) - 1 AS day_idx,
      AVG(avg_disk_used) AS avg_used
    FROM public.sys_hourly
    WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
  ) d
  GROUP BY device_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 7
) r
JOIN (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, disk_total_gb
  FROM public.sys_metrics
  WHERE disk_total_gb > 0
  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC
) t ON t.device_id = r.device_id
ORDER BY 1 ASC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until resource saturation for CPU, RAM, and Disk using 30-day linear regression.

panels.title: Disk: Days Until Full

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_usage AS (
  SELECT device_id,
    time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY time_bucket('1 day', bucket)) - 1 AS day_idx,
    AVG(avg_disk_used) AS avg_used
  FROM public.sys_hourly
  WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
totals AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, disk_total_gb
  FROM public.sys_metrics
  WHERE disk_total_gb > 0
  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC
),
regression AS (
  SELECT device_id,
    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS slope,
    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS intercept
  FROM daily_usage
  GROUP BY device_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 7
)
SELECT r.device_id AS metric,
  CASE
    WHEN r.slope <= 0 THEN 9999
    WHEN t.disk_total_gb <= 0 THEN 9999
    ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(ROUND((t.disk_total_gb - r.intercept) / r.slope, 0), 9999))
  END AS value
FROM regression r
JOIN totals t ON t.device_id = r.device_id
ORDER BY value ASC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until disk saturation based on 30-day linear regression. Red < 30d, Orange < 90d, Green > 180d.

panels.title: RAM: Days Until Full

targets.rawSql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id) device_id, ram_total_mb
  FROM public.sys_metrics
  WHERE ram_total_mb > 0
  ORDER BY device_id, time DESC
),
daily_ram AS (
  SELECT device_id,
    time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY time_bucket('1 day', bucket)) - 1 AS day_idx,
    AVG(avg_ram_used) AS avg_used
  FROM public.sys_hourly
  WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
regression AS (
  SELECT device_id,
    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS slope,
    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_used, day_idx), 0) AS intercept
  FROM daily_ram
  GROUP BY device_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 7
)
SELECT r.device_id AS metric,
  CASE
    WHEN r.slope <= 0 THEN 9999
    WHEN t.ram_total_mb <= 0 THEN 9999
    ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(ROUND((t.ram_total_mb - r.intercept) / r.slope, 0), 9999))
  END AS value
FROM regression r
JOIN totals t ON t.device_id = r.device_id
ORDER BY value ASC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until RAM saturation based on 30-day linear regression trend.

panels.title: CPU: Days Until Saturation

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_usage AS (
  SELECT device_id,
    time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY time_bucket('1 day', bucket)) - 1 AS day_idx,
    AVG(avg_cpu) AS avg_cpu
  FROM public.sys_hourly
  WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
regression AS (
  SELECT device_id,
    COALESCE(regr_slope(avg_cpu, day_idx), 0) AS slope,
    COALESCE(regr_intercept(avg_cpu, day_idx), 0) AS intercept
  FROM daily_usage
  GROUP BY device_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 7
)
SELECT device_id AS metric,
  CASE
    WHEN slope <= 0 THEN 9999
    WHEN intercept >= 100 THEN 0
    ELSE GREATEST(0, LEAST(ROUND((100 - intercept) / slope, 0), 9999))
  END AS value
FROM regression
ORDER BY value ASC
LIMIT 1

panels.description: Days until CPU reaches 100% saturation based on 30-day linear regression.

panels.title: Fleet Health Score

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Fleet Score' AS metric, value FROM public.v_fleet_score

panels.description: Composite fleet health score (0-100%) from v_fleet_health view.

panels.title: Disk Usage Trend + Linear Regression Forecast

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  device_id,
  AVG(avg_disk_used) AS "Disk Used (GB)"
FROM public.sys_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
  AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  AND avg_disk_used >= 0
  AND avg_disk_used < 1048576
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  device_id,
  AVG(avg_disk_used) AS "Disk Used (GB)"
FROM public.sys_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
  AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  AND avg_disk_used >= 0
  AND avg_disk_used < 1048576
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC

SELECT
  bucket AS "time",
  device_id,
  AVG(avg_disk_used) AS "Disk Used (GB)"
FROM public.sys_hourly
WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket)
  AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  AND avg_disk_used >= 0
  AND avg_disk_used < 1048576
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC

panels.description: Hourly disk usage trend with linear regression forecast (dashed orange, 30-day projection).

panels.title: CPU Load Trend (30-Day Average)

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS "time", device_id, AVG(avg_cpu) AS "Avg CPU %" FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.description: 30-day daily average CPU utilization per machine. Used for long-term capacity forecasting.

panels.title: RAM Usage Trend (30-Day Average)

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_ram AS (
  SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS time,
    device_id,
    AVG(avg_ram_used) AS avg_used,
    AVG(avg_ram_total) AS avg_total
  FROM public.sys_hourly
  WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring})
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
  time,
  device_id AS metric,
  ROUND(
    (avg_used / NULLIF(avg_total, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC,
    2
  ) AS "RAM Usage %"
FROM daily_ram
WHERE avg_total > 0
ORDER BY 1 ASC

panels.description: 30-day daily average RAM utilization per machine. Used for long-term capacity forecasting.

panels.title: CPU Z-Score Anomaly (3σ)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT avg(avg_cpu) as mu, stddev(avg_cpu) as sigma FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(bucket)) SELECT bucket AS time, (avg_cpu - mu) / NULLIF(sigma, 0) AS "Z-Score" FROM public.sys_hourly, stats WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND $__timeFilter(bucket) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Fleet-wide CPU Z-Score anomaly detection using 60-minute rolling window. Red zones = ±3σ anomalies.

panels.title: Temperature Z-Score Anomaly (3σ)

targets.rawSql: WITH stats AS (SELECT avg(max_temp) as mu, stddev(max_temp) as sigma FROM public.sys_hourly WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket)) SELECT bucket AS time, (max_temp - mu) / NULLIF(sigma, 0) AS "Z-Score" FROM public.sys_hourly, stats WHERE device_id IN (${machine_id:sqlstring}) AND max_temp > 0 AND $__timeFilter(bucket) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.description: Fleet-wide temperature Z-Score anomaly detection. Red zones indicate readings beyond ±3 standard deviations.
